Name: Dragon Aviation Capital (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Dragon Aviation Capital (DAC) is one of the most trusted independent technical advisors to the aviation industry and handles all aspects of technical consulting services, asset management and also provides aviation-focused advisory.

Headquartered in Singapore with regional offices in Hong Kong and Shanghai, Dragon Aviation Capital(DAC) is uniquely positioned in the industry and has the capability to provide a seamless approach on all technical services, for both aircraft operators and financiers, covering the entire aircraft& engine life-cycle from pre-acquisition and delivery phase through to commercial operation and asset redelivery, sale or part-out 

Dragon Aviation Capital(DAC) ’s services are tailored to the client's specific requirements, advising on all aspects of commercial and management exposure to maximize asset value while minimizing transactional risk and techno-commercial exposures. Services are performed by a team of experienced professionals from all areas of the aviation and aerospace industry . Dragon Aviation Capital(DAC) focuses on providing reliable and timely services to customers around the globe.

Leveraging on its founder’s relationships developed in the course of technical consultation, the company had secured the rights to purchase brand new aircraft engines - IAE V2527-A5 for A320s from the manufacturer which are extremely hard to come by in the market. The company had also secured commitments from airlines in Asia Pacific to lease x3 spare engines from the company. As a result, the company is foraying into the engine leasing segment to provide an end to end integrated solution (spare engine provision) for its’ customers.

From the preconceptual planning stage to harvesting and marketing the final products, we strive to go the extra mile to exceed our clients’ expectations. Call Plantations International today and find out what we can do for you.

Name: Strategic Marine
Description:
Strategic Marine is a leading shipbuilder with an international outlook and an established reputation for producing quality, high performance commercial & governmental vessels for markets across the globe.

Strategic Marine has built and delivered over 600 vessels made of both aluminium and steel for a variety of clients in the maritime, offshore, tourism and naval defence sectors. Aluminium is Strategic Marine’s specialty. Strategic Marine’s solid reputation for building high-performance vessels, historically focused on aluminium, has also become associated with steel-based construction over the last few years.

Beyond shipbuilding, the company offers Service and Maintenance, Fabrication and Engineering, and Marine Logistics services.

The company is expanding on its position as a leading global shipbuilder by consolidating and strengthening its position in the European wind farm vessel and workboat sectors of the market. This comes off the back of several successful recent newbuild contracts for the European market over the last few years.

Strategic Marine is committed to delivering high quality products and pride ourselves in providing the first-class service that our clients deserve.

Our Values:
INTEGRITY & ACCOUNTABILITY
PROFESSIONALISM
OWNERSHIP FOR SAFETY & ENVIRONMENT
TEAMWORK
STAKEHOLDER FOCUS

Name: ROTORTRADE
Description: Established in 2012 by industry expert Philippe Lubrano, Rotortrade has grown into a truly global helicopter dealership and a recognized leader in the pre-owned helicopter market. Operating through 15 dealerships worldwide and 3 certified maintenance centers, Rotortrade delivers a seamless, end-to-end experience across its three core service pillars: helicopter sales, maintenance (MRO), and financing solutions. With an inventory exceeding USD 120 million in fully owned aircraft, Rotortrade stands as the only helicopter dealership in the world offering such scale and independence—ensuring immediate access to a wide choice of operational aircrafts to meet customers’ diverse mission requirements. As the sole distributor of Leonardo Civil Helicopters, an approved reseller of Airbus Civil Helicopters, and a trusted partner of Bell, Safran, and Pratt & Whitney for Certified Pre-Owned programs, Rotortrade provides unparalleled access to the world’s leading helicopter brands. Each aircraft undergoes comprehensive inspections and quality assurance processes to guarantee the highest standards of safety, reliability, and performance. A global dealership with local expertise, Rotortrade leverages deep industry knowledge and a commitment to transparency to redefine the helicopter transaction experience—offering tailored, locally relevant solutions to customers around the world. In October 2021, The Helicopter Company (THC), backed by Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund (PIF), acquired a 51% stake in Rotortrade, followed by full ownership in June 2023, further strengthening the company’s foundation for innovation, growth, and excellence worldwide. Rotortrade: Helicopters You Can Trust.

Name: Green Li-ion
Description:
Green Li-ion known as a vital contributer to energy security. Globally Green Li-ion is a developer and provider of innovative battery recycling, refining & re-manufacturing technologies, that have the potential to revolutionise the global battery materials & energy storage sector. The Company’s technologies are modular processing plants which will enable EV producers, battery recyclers and battery manufacturers to address the pressing need for greater levels of sustainability and security of supply in country.
For further information please go to the Company’s website: greenli-ion.com

Green Li-ion solves the existential risk to the precious metals industry and the environment. Our patented deep technology is Cleaner, Faster and 4x more profitable than current Lithium-Ion Battery material refining and the only technology to Re-manufacture battery cathode & anode material. 

For two decades Lithium-Ion batteries have been our preferred source of portable energy. The precious metals used to manufacture them are often mined in socially and environmentally damaging ways. The reason they are not recycled is that it is simply not economical to do so with current technology. Green Li-ion changes this by removing 1 - 3 inefficient processes and improved purity of the output making Lithium-Ion Battery rejuvenation and re-use the new reality.

Name: Singapore Aviation Academy
Description:
The Singapore Aviation Academy (SAA), established in 1958, is the internationally-recognised training arm of the Civil Aviation Authority of Singapore. It offers a wide range of operational and management programmes that benchmark international standards and best practices to meet the training needs of the global aviation community. SAA is an ICAO Regional Training Centre of Excellence, ICAO Aviation Security Training Centre, ICAO-endorsed Government Safety Inspector Training Centre and ICAO TRAINAIR PLUS Full Member.

Through its four specialised schools - School of Aviation Management, School of Aviation Safety & Security, School of Air Traffic Services and School of Airport Emergency Services - SAA has trained over 91,000 participants from 200 countries and territories since 1958.

By consistently staying ahead of developments taking place in international civil aviation, SAA is able to develop new programmes not readily available elsewhere. SAA also offers degree and graduate diploma programmes through alliances with reputable national and overseas academic institutions.

The Academy provides a forum for information sharing and networking amongst the managers and specialists in the international civil aviation community, by organising workshops, conferences and seminars regularly. It also hosts numerous international meetings and conferences organised by international organisations such as ICAO, APEC and ACI.

Description:
Lita Ocean was established in the 1970s and has since become one of the leading shipping companies in Singapore providing a diverse range of marine and shipyard services.

Our well-equipped waterfront yard, a fleet of more than 40 various types of vessels and an experienced workforce have served various governmental organizations, port authorities, international oil majors, offshore oil and gas companies, marine engineering and marine service providers.

Our business encompasses the following areas:
•	Owners and operators of tugs, barges, ferries, landing crafts and 
 floating cranes
•	Shipbuilding, repair and fabrication works
•	Ship operators and agents
•	Specialist handling of Class 1 explosive cargo and ammunition
•	Tank cleaning, gas freeing and hydro/grit blasting
•	Oil Spill Response and Deployment
•	Marine consultant services

We have a fleet of more than 50 various types of vessels available for charter for a diverse range of applications. They include Ro-Ro vessels, landing crafts, floating cranes, tugs, barges, launches, ferries, pilot boats, mooring boats and multipurpose work boats. Our marine services are ISO 9001: 2015 certified.

The business model of builder-owner-operator has provided us with many benefits that are passed on to our clients. Our knowledge gained from operating our own vessels gives us the edge to build boats that are practical, capable, contemporary Design & Comfort and cost-efficient in operations. Our control and emphasis on quality ensure that vessels leaving our yard are in top notch condition.  

Our reputation in this field is widely known for our 'Safe' and 'Efficient' operation models. We have achieved numerous awards and recognition over the years from the governmental and private organisations. 

Lita Ocean is strongly committed to serve and willing to go extra miles to gain client's satisfaction. In more coming years, we will continue to deliver our promise to carry out 'Safe & Sound' environment for all.

Name: Svanehoj Singapore
Description:
As of October 1st, 2024, Hamworthy Pumps has officially changed its name to Svanehoj Singapore, uniting our organization under a single, unified brand. This strategic move reflects the commitment to strengthening our identity as one consolidated company and fostering a deeper sense of belonging across all teams.

With over 100 years in the pump industry, Hamworthy Pumps is renowned for its high-quality in-line pumps in the marine, offshore, and defense sectors. Now fully integrated and branded as Svanehøj, we continue to produce and sell the original Hamworthy Pumps products, preserving the legacy and reputation of our trusted brand. 

This strategic move does not imply any organizational changes, and Hamworthy Pumps remains a distinct product brand within Svanehøj's portfolio, maintaining its unique identity and market presence.

As a specialist in critical liquids, Svanehøj offers a wide range of solutions that support the energy transition in the hard-to-abate sectors: reliable, high-performance marine pumps, cutting-edge tank control systems, and integrated service solutions for pumps, compressors, and valves.

Together with ITT and under the Svanehøj banner, we are committed to accelerating growth, driving new commercial synergies, and, more than anything, sustaining our long-term contributions to powering a better future.

Description:
The Singapore Furniture Industries Council (SFIC) is established since 1981 as the official representative body of Singapore’s furniture and furnishings industry. It has a membership of over 350 companies, spanning across five key industry clusters: furniture manufacturers, interior fit-out specialists, retailers, designers and materials/components/services providers.  Collectively, our industry players have a global footprint in over 80 countries todate. 

As an aggregator and multiplier in the furniture ecosystem, the SFIC’s vision is to position the Singapore furniture industry as the nexus of tomorrow’s work-life integration for sustainable urban living. 

SFIC’s priority initiatives include internationalisation, design development, business innovation, digitalisation and sustainability to enable members to stay future-ready and competitive while upgrading enterprise and human capital capabilities within the industry.   Nurturing the NexGen industry leaders under the SFIC Young Leaders Chapter is also of paramount importance. 

SFIC ‘s talent and training development arm is the SFIC Institute, which conducts a holistic range of courses, masterclasses, manpower placement programmes and consultancy services for the furniture ecosystem and built environment.  

The SFIC also represents Singapore in the ASEAN Furniture Industries Council (AFIC), with the aim of further strengthening intra-ASEAN trade and its competitive advantage in the global market. 

www.singaporefurniture.com

Name: Space Launch Alliance
Description:
Enabling Safe, Strategic, and Scalable Space Operations Worldwide

Space Launch Alliance (SLA) offers a comprehensive suite of global advisory and specialist services to spaceports and spaceflight operators seeking to establish or enhance launch capabilities. As a collective of Suitably Qualified and Experienced Personnel (SQEP), SLA operates as a neutral, non-aligned, and unregistered entity—allowing us to provide independent, expert-driven analysis and evaluation of spaceport infrastructure and launch systems across all geographies.

Our Expertise, Your Strategic Advantage

SLA brings together a core team of domain experts capable of delivering consultancy across the entire operational landscape of launch programs. Our core competencies include:
- Safety Assurance & Regulatory Risk Assessment
- Legal and Compliance Advisory
- Systems and Operational Readiness Reviews
- Site Operations and Infrastructure Management
- Security Planning and Technology Integration

Depending on your project’s needs, we scale our team to include specialists in:
- Human Factors and Environmental Impact
- Cryogenic and High-Energy Propellant Handling
- Electronic and Cybersecurity Risk Mitigation
- Technical Logistics and Transport Integration
- Maritime and Coastal Launch Operations

Getting It Right the First Time, Everywhere

With the space launch industry expanding globally, there is simply too much at stake to compromise on foundational safety, operational integrity, or regulatory preparedness. SLA is committed to supporting emerging and existing spaceports and launch operators to avoid costly delays, reputational risks, and safety failures. We believe that global credibility starts with rigorous pre-launch planning, led by proven professionals.

Get in touch: admin@allspacelaunch.com

Global Advisory and Technical Services for Spaceports and Launch Operators.

Description:
True 2 Materials develops and manufactures graphene and sub-nanometer molecular powder based solutions for industry. 

Our focus is on next generation high temperature superconductors, and improving conductivity through the application of graphene and sub-nanometer powders to specific problems in the Energy, Manufacturing, Textiles and Healthcare industries. 

Our substrate-free  films are the thinnest, flattest available and have fantastic specifications for Electronics, Filtration and Particle Physics applications. 

Our sub-nanometer powders are the first of their kind in the world. At less than 0.45 nm, we are continually amazed at the things we can build with them. Our newest product is a paintable high temperature superconductor made possible by combining these molecules with graphene in a novel way.

We develop and co-develop our products to match your specifications. If you are interested in taking your products the the pinnacle of performance through the application of nano and sub-nanometer technologies we would like to meet with you.

Name: Ram Group (Singapore)
Description:
RAM Group (RG) is a Singapore based multi-national Technology Startup Company operating out of Singapore, Germany, and Israel. Ram Group is an innovation leader in sensor research, development, design, and fabrication of nano-electronics and digital technology. The combination of our widely acclaimed leadership in microchip technology and profound material engineering and ICT (Information and Communication Technology) expertise is what makes us unique. By leveraging our world-class infrastructure and local and international ecosystem of innovation labs across a multitude of industries, we create groundbreaking innovation in application domains such as healthcare, smart cities and mobility, logistics, and industrial testing and monitoring. RG brings together close to 40 brilliant minds from over 10 nationalities, and is headquartered in Singapore. RG has distributed R&D groups at a number of universities and private-labs, in Germany, Israel, Singapore, and has offices in Singapore and Germany.

Ram Group operates multiple independent R&D and micro-nano-fabrication facilities in Germany and Israel. RG's primary state-of-the-are innovation labs and CMOS fab is located in Zweibrucken, Germany where the Company develops bio-sensor technologies, wireless autonomous sensor technologies and wearable electronics in an open innovation setting. A key feature of RG’s Innovation Center is its development model structured around industry and academia in which RG fills a critical gap between both, and facilitates accelerating commercialization of products into the market. This is a key component to RG’s technology being years ahead of its competitors. It is this kind of cross-fertilization that enables Ram Group to tune its scientific strategy to industrial needs and solve tomorrow’s consumer needs in an agile manner shifting from volume to value based products.

Name: Aircraft Support Industries Group
Description:
Aircraft Support Industries Group (ASIG) is today a world leader in the design and construction of Aircraft Maintenance Facilities having designed and built over 80 hangar facilities worldwide. The Company has the in-house expertise in all disciplines required to design and build state of the art facilities. These include but are not limited to architectural facility planning, structural engineering, mechanical and electrical engineering and fire suppression. 

Specialized equipment required in various hangar facilities like docking systems, crane and teleplatform systems, wheel retraction pits, integrated service pits and hangar doors are designed in house or in conjunction with other specialist suppliers within the industry. 

Facilities designed and built to date range from shelters for military aircraft, right through to heavy maintenance facilities for multiple wide bodied aircrafts, like the A380, with dedicated paint bays, full support workshops and administration buildings. 

ASIG own the intellectual property rights to the stressed arch technology, an innovative post tension system adapted to structural steel buildings which has been extensively used globally and is extremely cost efficient for clear span structures of 60-300 meters. To support this, the company has specialized equipment and personnel required to stress erect stressed arch structures and vertically lift large conventional roof structures ranging from 100-6000 tonnes. 

Currently, ASIG is also expanding into a range of capital financing solutions to assist our clients with cost-effective finance packages for outright purchase or lease-back of a facility.

Name: Koperski Lab @ IFIM, NUS
Description:
The Institute for Functional Intelligent Materials (I-FIM) at the National University of Singapore (NUS) was newly established on 1 September 2021. Headed by world-renowned physicists Nobel Laureate Prof. Sir Konstantin Novoselov and NUS Distinguished Prof. Antonio Castro Neto, I-FIM will be the world’s first institute dedicated to the design, synthesis, and application of Functional Intelligent Materials (FIMs). Its global vision is to create a platform to develop FIMs with predetermined properties and autonomous, dynamic functionalities which can respond to changing environmental conditions. I-FIM will then investigate the use of such materials for smart applications in various sectors of technology and medicine.

The Koperski Lab investigates optoelectronic, vibrational, magnetic, and structural properties of layered 2D materials. We engineer and characterize van der Waals heterostructure-based devices as a platform to study excitonic physics and quantum phenomena in transition metal dichalcogenides and 2D magnetic materials, with potential applications in single photon source creation and emerging telecommunication technologies.

Name: Print Media Association SIngapore
Description:
The Print & Media Association, Singapore is the national representative body for the printing industry in Singapore.
Founded in 1937 membership is open to all companies engaged in printing and allied trades, companies that supply equipment and consumables to the printing industry and companies that support the printing industry such as event and exhibition companies and freight forwarders.

Publications include a bi-monthly publication PRINT Singapore and a Printing & Packaging Industry Directory is published annually in conjunction with the Singapore Packaging Council. The Directory provides important information about the printing and packaging industry and the opportunity for companies to promote their services. 

The Association’s website (www.pmas.sg) provides information regards its various activities and details about members.

The Association organises regular networking sessions, courses, seminars, conferences and overseas study tours for the benefit of members. A close working relationship is maintained with SPRING Singapore and other relevant bodies in order to protect and enhance the interests of members.

Members are encouraged to communicate with the Association about the challenges that they face. The Association in turn provides feedback to SPRING Singapore and other Government bodies. Linkages are also maintained with regional and international printing bodies.
 

WHAT SERVICES DOES PMAS PROVIDE FOR MEMBERS

1.  The national representative body of the printing industry in Singapore

2.  Provides a channel of communication between the members, the government, and overseas printing associations

3.  Organises seminars/courses, study tours, sporting events and an annual conference to promote understanding of technology

4.  Provides information and technical updates and encourages members to tap on the various Government support schemes

5.  Helps members to promote their business.

Name: FEFCO Fine Home Furniture
Description:
FEFCO Fine Home Furniture was founded in 1954 and specializes in the design and manufacture of high-quality rosewood furniture. The company originated in Singapore when it was founded at a time when the Asian economy was booming and the market demand for high-end home products was gradually increasing. rosewood furniture is deeply loved by consumers for its elegant appearance, durability and natural texture of precious wood.

In the early days of its establishment, FEFCO Fine Home Furniture mainly focused on providing traditional style rosewood furniture to the local market. Based on exquisite craftsmanship and high-quality materials, it quickly won the recognition of customers. With the development of business, the company gradually expanded to overseas markets, especially other countries and regions in Asia. Its products include mahogany tables, chairs, cabinets, beds, etc. The design style combines oriental traditions with modern elements, focusing on both artistry and practicality.

In order to ensure the safety of furniture during transportation, the company adopts the packaging standards of the European Federation of Corrugated Board Manufacturers (FEFCO). This practice ensures the stability and safety of furniture products during long-distance transportation, effectively reduces the risk of damage, and enhances the brand's international reputation.

After years of development, FEFCO Fine Home Furniture has not only established a solid market position in Singapore, but has also successfully expanded to China, Malaysia, Hong Kong and other places, providing high-quality rosewood furniture options to more families.

Name: Signarama Singapore CORPORATE
Description:
Signarama is the world’s largest sign and graphics franchise. Our award-winning franchise brand is part of a successful constellation of business-to-business franchise brands under Starpoint Brands, a division of United Franchise Group (UFG)  - “The Global Leader for Entrepreneurs”. 
 
It all started in New York in 1986, when Roy and Ray Titus opened the first Signarama store in Farmingdale, New York. After their success locally, the father and son team decided to open a second location in South Florida. In 1987, Signarama began franchising. 
 
Signarama currently operates in over 30 countries, including France, Canada, UK, South Africa, New Zealand, Australia and Singapore. We have master licence partners in 20 countries. Most Signarama stores are independently owned and operated. With over 35 years of experience and over 700 Signarama store locations worldwide, Signarama is undoubtedly the largest sign franchise in the world. By investing in sign business opportunities, you’re starting a business in a profitable industry whose demand and reach is not just sustainable, but continually growing. We are a proven and fulfilling opportunity for those who are a good fit.

Name: Emperor Brand Holdings Pte Ltd
Description:
Emperor Brand has more than 60 years of history. Emperor Brand's first swiftlet house was started in 1958 in Indonesia. All the company's bird nests are personally hand harvested and checked to ensure quality and sustainability. Emperor Brand started with raw bird nests trading and eventually progressed into large scale bird nests cleaning, dry bird nest distribution and ready to eat birdnest bottling manufacturing. Emperor Brand's first raw bird nest processing factory in Indonesia was setup in 2002. In 2004, the company's first Asia HQ office was setup in Singapore. The company's sales headquarter, in Singapore, provides sales and customers support in the entire Asia region. Emperor Brand's products can be found in countries like Hong Kong, Singapore, Mainland China, Taiwan and Japan. Emperor Brand have also won numerous awards since.

Currently, Emperor Brand offers more than 50 types of cleaned dry bird nests products to wholesalers, medical halls and retailed stores in Asia. Emperor Brand birdnest processing is hygienic and chemical-free, as are consumers range from children to elderly and pregnant women and the company wants to provide food products that are safe and beneficial for their consumption. 

Emperor Brand's Ready-to-consume Bottled Birdnest product lines have also grown in range. Emperor Brand bottled bird nests products manufactured in Singapore, adhere to the most stringent conditions. The company prohibits the use of food colorings and bleach in their food processing. Emperor Brand products are sent to Agri-Food & Veterinary Authority (Singapore) on a regular basis for certification of their quality.

Emperor Brand Products have grown beyond Birdnests, today, we provide high quality tonics (Tibet Cordyceps, American Ginsengs, Ling Zhi and more), supplements (Deer Placenta, Wild Fish Omega 3, Maca) and food products (Abalones, Sea cucumbers, Scallops, Fish Maws and more) to our consumers at their best pricings.

Emperor Brand continues to strive for excellence in our quality and services to our customers.

Name: LOCABA Bakery Singapore
Description:
It all started in Europe: In 2012 Austrian-born Markus Berndt was diagnosed with diabetes Type 2. The former manager changed his entire lifestyle and embarked on a long quest of research, expert discussions and self-experiments. And it paid off: Today Markus is considered as “cured” (without ever having taken insulin), is a bestselling author and with his lectures and seminars he has led hundreds of interested Type 2 diabetics out of their lifestyle dead end.
His mission included – against all odds – good food. Markus was convinced that it’s possible to rebuild dishes so that they taste great AND are optimized for the human metabolism. For six years Markus experimented with hundreds of ingredients and thousands of combinations, always checking their effect on his blood sugar level. Throughout this process he collected an enormous amount of data and a unique know-how. A know-how that has materialized in delicious treats that are available in Singapore since March 2019.
From Austria To Singapore
The renowned Singaporean hospitality group, Ponte Group, discovered the treasure of Markus’ recipes and know-how. In a co-operation between Markus and local chefs a portfolio of cakes and desserts has been created that all have the signature LOCABA qualities: All cakes are low-carb, (household) sugar free, diabetic-friendly and as they are totally grain free they are also free from gluten containing ingredients.
LOCABA uses cage-free eggs and strictly no artificial preservatives. The latter is the reason why there are not products in stock at the bakery. All cakes are freshly baked to order.
Customers appreciate this high-quality approach. The cakes range from 45 SGD to 135 SGD (serve up to 14 persons).
LOCABA’s low-carb cakes are also suitable for keto or paleo nutrition and they are far from being recommendable for diabetics only. As they are good for your figure and your teeth, LOCABA cakes are perfect for healthy conscious foodies and for kids!

Với sự phát triển nguồn nhân lực hiện tại, Chí cường với hơn 20 nhân viên là những con người nhiệt huyết nhất đầy sang tạo cùng trình độ chuyên môn cao, tận tâm và sẵn sàng cống hiến sẽ là cầu nối mang đến khách hàng những sản phẩm, dịch vụ công nghệ an toàn hiện đại .

Ban giám đốc CÔNG NGHỆ CHÍ CƯỜNG sẽ cố gắng và cố gắng hơn nữa để mang lại lợi ích cũng như các sản phẩm công nghệ thong tin tiên tiến choc ho khách hang, và cuối cùng cty chúng tôi cũng xin chân chân thành cảm ơn sự hỗ trợ từ các hang , cũng như sự ủng hộ của quý khách hàng để cho CÔNG NGHỆ CHÍ CƯỜNG được phục vụ tốt nhất trong thời gian tới.

Name: The Moments Lab
Description:
“The best thing about memories is making them”

Ama Ata Aido,

Ghanaian Author and Playwright



All it takes is one moment; one moment to form a memory – A memory to influence lives for years to come.

Our journey began in the warm company of family and friends.

 We realised that the best memories we so fondly look back on are the ones shared together in reality. Of course, our phones will always be present to capture these moments, but there is more to what our phones can do to tell the tales of our personal lives.

How precious is a singular fleeting moment! To bask in the joy of a matrimony, of seeing our children take their first steps, of having a great night of food and drinks with the ones we love!

This thought was the catalyst for a newfound passion. A passion to seek means and ways to immortalise precious moments beyond the ones and zeroes, beyond the impermanence of polaroids and conventional photos. 

And as we pursue this passion, we write our history, to be fondly remembered by those we love.

This is our story. What’s yours?

Name: Drone Solutions
Description:
Drone Solutions (DSS) is a Singapore-proud company operating in the evolving Unmanned System Industry space, with an aspiration to lead innovations in the areas of Unmanned System Technologies (USTs) through Research & Development.

DSS aims to cultivate talents from universities and at the same time, develop strong research and development collaborations among organisations; both public & private.

Coupled with strong strategic international partnerships with key players from manufacturers to operators and other service providers in the aerial, terrestrial and aquatic unmanned systems, we deliver affordable and sustainable solutions best catered to the needs our clients. 

DSS delivers innovative, integrated solutions in complex areas across air, land and sea with the various USTs it operates:

Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS)
Primarily Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLS); these are instrumental in both short to long range reconnaissance, surveying, mapping as well as delivery and logistics.

Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV)
Operating across rugged, all terrain via mobile stations as well as fixed control centres.

Unmanned Underwater Vehicle (UUV)
Primarily deployed for underwater data gathering, inspection, mapping and reconnaissance logistics.

The range of technologies DSS can apply to each respective solution includes:
• 3D Imaging
• Active Sonar
• Infrared Imaging
• Thermal Imaging 
• Photogrammetry
• Artificial Intelligence
• Real Time Kinematic 
• Orthomosaic Imaging and/or Mapping
• NDVI Derived Imaging
• LiDAR Remote Sensing

DSS’s range of capabilities and technologies are applied but not limited to the following:
•	Inspection of civil, public & industrial infrastructures, oil & gas onshore as well as offshore structures
•	Power and communication networks, utility services, marine shipping, vessels & ports, as well as agriculture
•	Conservation for the environment, marine, forestry and wildlife

Name: Wenaas Workwear Singapore
Description:
Feel free to contact our great colleagues Isaac Laai: +65 9725-2336 / isaac.lai@wenaas.com and Junee Montales: +65 9616 1873 / junee.montales@wenaas.com.

In 1931 Lars Wenaas started up a small garment factory in the cellar of his house in Måndalen, on the north-western coast of Norway. Though hard work, good salesmanship and a strong dedication, several generations of the Wenaas family built the foundation for the company that is now known as Wenaas Workwear. Which is part of Europe's largest workwear group.

Wenaas are the experts when it comes to clothing to protect industrial workers in hazardous working environments and we have set the standard for flame retardant workwear within the oil and gas industry. 

Wenaas has been protecting oil and gas workers in the North sea since the begin of the industry. For decades we have been the industry's preferred supplier of flame retardant workwear, and operators and contractors continue to choose Wenaas. We are proud of the trust that our customers place in us.

Our product experts work closely together with those who will actually use the products. This form of direct innovation, combined with our specialist competency in the industry and products, competitive head-to-toe range and uncompromising focus on the user's personal safety, has made Wenaas the market leader and preferred choice for the oil and gas workers in the North sea.

The well- known Wenaas W has taken on a special meaning for our users. It symbolises safety and provides the user with a special sense of security.  The W is also a guarantee that the product is of a high quality and is certified to the latest EN standards.

We're not your typical A-to-B virtual airline, we aim to live up to the same values and professionalism of our real world counterpart with great service and great quality. We have been providing our professional services on water treatment for aquaculture, laboratory design and intensive recirculatinf aquaculture systems for the past ten years.Currently we serve customers in China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Indonesia and the Middle East.

MicroTouch, the global leader in capacitive touch solutions, we have drawn together some of the industry's most knowledgeable touch technology professionals and industry veterans. This experience, spread over a broad variety of markets, allows us to pay special attention to customers’ needs and assist them to design their own specific—often unique—application and/or environment.

In February 1982, former CEO James Logan formed MicroTouch in the laundry room of a house in Wayland, MA, with an initial business plan of developing touchscreen software for PCs. He succeeded beyond all expectations. At that time, touch technology was competing with the mouse as the future interface.

Today, MicroTouch provides a wealth of touch-driven business solutions for the retail, gaming, hospitality, healthcare, fitness, industrial automation, and financial markets. In an industry that’s struggling with product availability and to meet the demands of customers worldwide, our factory-direct, single supply chain process not only provides the highest quality of capacitive technology but also brings unmatched efficiency and flexibility.

Description:
You Tiao Man transformed from a hawker business into a manufacturing brand, which grew to become one of Singapore's biggest You Tiao manufacturers - serving Hotels, Caterers, Restaurants, Cafes and Hawkers.

In April 2017, Seng Huat Bean Curd has also successfully obtained its first Muis Halal Certification.

In 2018, Alan proved he has greater plans for the business when he introduced new machineries and technologies to help improve efficiency and boost production. Seng Huat production has since moved from the original Defu Lane factory to Jurong Food Hub, where it boosts larger factory space thus allowing Seng Huat to grow and expand its production.

Name: Joel Yang's NanoLab
Description:
Our group is interested in the science and engineering of making small things and in using them to control light. How small? Between roughly 1 nanometer to several micrometers. Materials at these length scales interact with light in remarkable ways, not seen in the bulk. For instance, polished aluminum and silver are well known to be reflective metals in the bulk. But tiny little particles of the same materials start appearing colorful, with colors that depend sensitively on their actual size, shape, and arrangements. The result is a unique approach to produce colorful prints at unprecedented levels of detail. At 100,000 dots per inch (dpi), this method is a thousand times higher resolution than a desktop color printed. Importantly, the ability to generate colors on demand provides an appealing alternative to pigments and dyes that might be less sustainable.

Through advanced techniques in nanotechnology, we make nanostructures out of a broad range of materials. These materials range from metals such as gold, silver, and aluminum to transparent polymers, 2D materials and semiconductors like silicon. We have probed them with electron beams, shot pulses of energetic photons at them, and performed numerical simulations to investigate their behavior. The fascinating findings are reported in our research publications.

We believe in making the world a better place through our innovations in the field of nanotechnology. Utilizing the craft of miniaturization, we strive to make devices smaller, better, and faster.

Name: EverDesk+
Description:
Our mission is to make top quality ergonomic products accessible so anyone can create an empowering workspace.

Based in Singapore, ErgoEdge designs, develops and manufactures height-adjustable sit/stand desk solutions, chairs and accessories that revolutionize the way people work and interact on a daily basis. We provide a simple yet affordable way to make all offices/work stations happier, healthier and more productive. 

++ How It Started 

It was frustrating. We all spend long hours seated at our desks, with adverse impact on our well-being. Yet, when we searched for standing desks and ergonomic products, nothing met our standards. They were either exorbitantly expensive, poorly designed, or have terrible purchasing experience.

ErgoEdge was thus born.

Here, a simple mission guides us. Making top quality ergonomic products accessible so anyone can create an empowering workspace. We rethought everything – from design to materials to distribution channels – to add value while eliminating unnecessary costs. 

The result? Ergonomics products with uncompromising quality yet accessible prices.


+++ Product & Design Philosophy

Our product choices and designs are guided by two, seemingly at odds, goals:

1) Creating ergonomic products of the highest quality and product experience while;
2) Lowering the price consumers pay

This led to a re-examination of the industry. It started with the product. We studied the best out there to understand the features, materials, and manufacturing processes that makes them great. Then, we studied the manufacturing processes to identify what can be eliminated, simplified, or replaced without compromising the product experience. Finally, we optimized the supply and distribution chains to eliminate unnecessary costs.

The deal is simple. We invest the time, sweat and money to make it happen. And you get to enjoy the benefits – of affordable ergonomics products with uncompromising durability, features, and quality.

Celebrate Sophistication

The idea for Aroma Truffle started with a trip to Italy. To the Italians, the harvesting of ingredients, preparation and final dish was a demonstration of their passion and a form of refined art. A dear Italian friend hosted our visit to a Spoleto farm, and our eyes were opened to the world of truffles. We witnessed firsthand the entire process from farming to harvesting of Italian truffles, and discovered the hard work, discipline and artisanship involved. All of which drew strength from the fine traditions and cultures of Italy. This burning passion, which is not commonly found around the world, it drew our hearts inexorably towards it.

Aroma Truffle was then founded with one powerful vision: to bring the authentic taste of Italy to the rest of the world. A team of passionate individuals, Aroma Truffle strives for and challenges norms in the pursuit of quality and innovation. We do it all in order to serve up sophisticated, yet consistently delicious products that will satisfy even the most discerning palate. - 10 Most Creative Entrepreneurs From the Food And Beverage Industry In 2021 by APAC Entrepreneur

Name: Prorika
Description:
Who We Are
Bring together experienced individuals from the ingredient business, a challenging mission and an excellent proprietary product – and there you have the foundation of Prorika.

Operating in Europe, Prorika’s focus product comes from its own source. We serve all food industry players who see alternative protein as key to a sustainable food system that reduces climate impact and boosts profits.

What We Do
The basis of our offering is nutritious, quality plant based protein, alongside a multitude of environmental advantages. Legumes like soy and peas require little water and enrich the soil by fixing atmospheric nitrogen, benefiting regenerative farming.

Why We Do It
It is an undeniable fact that plant proteins account for half the climate impact compared to animal proteins, and that protein is one of the three macronutrients that human beings need to nourish themselves. Therefore, we find it encouraging to witness the rising demand for sustainable protein-rich alternatives that can both supplement and replace traditional protein sources, resulting in a more sustainable business model – improving the planet, people and profit.

The Mission
But – it is not enough to rely on high sustainability benefits with low impact. We must work to do more.

Therefore, our simple mission is to increase plant-based protein consumption for a sustainable planet and a healthier you.

Join us on our journey.

Our expertise, insight and adaptability give us the opportunity to serve the ever-expanding global community, ensuring stronger, better food sustainability. As we sow the seeds that make a positive difference in our world, a sustainable food future has never been closer. Learn more at http://donagroint.com.

Name: Pro-health Water Technologies
Description:
Pro-Health is the world’s first system to produce mineralized water through an automated filtering process. A smart water monitoring and dispensing system that can turn supplies of tap water into enhanced mineral water, Pro-Health provides consumers with fresh, spring-like water. As rich and as nutrient-packed as water freshly collected for mountainous regions around the world, Pro-Health allows for the precise control of mineral levels. The system is promising to revolutionize the water industry and introduce new technologies with broad applications in Singapore and beyond.

Subjecting water to a new re-mineralization process, Pro-Health infuses everyday tap water, used for drinking or cooking, with six vital nutrients or minerals. Consumers drinking or cooking with Pro-Health water are then exposed to these healthy, rich nutrients, which help to promote physical health and mental well-being. 

The lifeblood of humanity, water has been necessary for survival for all of time. With Pro-Health, traditional water is  being revitalized with new filtration and infusion technologies. Pro-Health has been pioneered by Chew Soo Yan with the help of technical and engineering teams from the Centre of Innovation@Singapore. Completing a successful prototype in January 2020, the Centre validated Pro-Health for its ability to mechanically re-mineralize and alter its nutrient composition in an automated process. 

Support Pro-Health on Kickstarter here: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/chewsooyan/pro-health-water-system-water

Pro-Health is a product of Pro-Health Water Technologies Pte Ltd. Developed by Chew Soo Yan, with the help of technical and engineering teams from the Centre of Innovation@Singapore, Pro-Health represents the latest in water filtration and infusion technologies. The system is expected to reshape current water filtration processes and re-mineralize the water we use for drinking and cooking with every day.

Name: Alchemy Affair
Description:
Cold-pressed juices have long been celebrated as a vibrant and natural way to nourish the body, harnessing the raw power of fruits and vegetables—without the need for artificial additives or pasteurisation. Unlike traditional juicing methods that generate heat and compromise nutritional integrity, cold pressing uses a hydraulic press to extract juice gently and without oxidation. This preserves the natural enzymes, vitamins, and minerals found in fresh produce, resulting in juices that are richer in color, bolder in flavor, and superior in nutritional value. It’s a modern, clean source of energy for those seeking to fuel their bodies with intention.

Today, cold-pressed juices have moved beyond trend status—they’ve become a daily essential for health-conscious individuals, busy professionals, and anyone looking to boost their immunity, vitality, and overall wellness. Detoxifying green blends with kale, cucumber, and lemon promote hydration and cleansing. Deep red elixirs made with beetroot and citrus support heart health and circulation. And invigorating combinations like ginger, pineapple, and turmeric deliver powerful anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits. Whether enjoyed as a morning energizer, mid-day refreshment, or post-workout recovery drink, cold-pressed juices are a delicious and convenient way to care for your health.

To support the active, fast-paced lifestyle of modern Singaporeans, we created The Alchemy Affair, a contemporary cold-pressed juice brand that reimagines wellness with a wide range of products designed for every moment of urban life. Beyond our signature juices, we offer innovative products like concentrated wellness shots and frozen tea bombs, crafted to deliver functional benefits in exciting new ways.

What attracted the people most was it’s freshness. Eventually, the demand for it increase rapidly, which lead to the expansion of their business. From small wet market to a ‘high Technology Manufacturing Factory’. With the loyal support of its regulars, Nyee Guan has rapidly grown to be stable and well-known in the fish ball market.

Nyee Guan revolutionised the concept of converting traditional hand-made products to High Technology manufacturing, along with quality control for each and every fish ball. To ensure the constant supply of Yellow Tail Fusilier Fish, factories were constructed in Indonesia to fish and produce fish meat. All high grade Yellow Fusilier Fish will be cut, washed and put to freeze at -55oC, and then transported to Singapore for manufacturing. Nyee Guan distributes fresh premium Yellow Tail Fusilier fish ball, fish cake and Niang Tou Fu to food courts, hawker centers, noodles stalls, restaurants and wet markets for daily retail.

Name: triple eyelid
Description:
Bespoked | Upcycle | Furniture

Triple Eyelid comprises a team of dedicated young designers, working hard into the research and development of environmentally sustainable design.
 
Be it interior, furniture, or product design, our focus is to re-define, re-design, and most importantly, reduce environmental waste.

How do we acquire industrial waste?
As Interior Designers for commercial, residential and hospitality background, we witness tonnes of waste materials discarded from job sites which we find especially wasteful.

All up-cycled products and furniture are acquired from discarded industrial waste from the local job sites. 
 
Why “triple eyelid”?
The attempt to rationalise the team’s quirky, and seemingly illogical name may be a tall one; but truth be told, it simply means that the team will be working so hard that we could even develop the triple eyelid phenomenon.      

Somebody once told us that managing a business is not fun and games, but ours is! :)

Name: Mai Home Decor
Description:
Mai Home Decor brings you “Works of Art”: exquisite lacquer furniture and lacquer lamps which are the marriage of creation and craftsmanship

Our collection includes lacquered table lamps, lacquered floor lamps, and many types of lacquered furniture for the living and dining rooms, such as lacquered TV cabinets, lacquered sideboards, lacquered coffee Tables, lacquered dining tables, lacquered consoles, lacquered side tables, etc.

The designs of Mai Home lacquered lamps and lacquered furniture are unique and multi-faceted: they create an ambience, evoke a lifestyle and highlight your home. Whether seductive or provocative, conceptual or decorative, traditional or modern, our lacquered furniture and lamps are stylish additions to your home. They illuminate your life and style. 

Mai Home creative design work, reinforced by impeccable finishes, results in balanced lines, shapes, materials, lacquer patterns and colors. Unique lacquer patterns and finishing define Mai Home's distinctive style. 

With glossy and smooth lacquer surface reflecting light like a mirror, our lacquered lamps and lacquered furniture are true representatives of the Traditional Lacquer School and the perfection of the “brilliant”.

At Mai Home, Lacquer is an "Art"

Mai Home Decor’s lacquered lamps, lacquered furniture and lacquered home decor accessories are entirely handcrafted by skilled artisans selected for their quality mindset. In our lacquer atelier, expertise takes precedence over machines: the use of proven tools and techniques passed on by previous generations is the rule. In the heat and dampness of Vietnam, our lacquer artisans work only with their hands to make each lacquered lamp and lacquered furniture undergo the desired transformation. This is an industrious art without being industrial. Patience, attention to detail, right gestures: they are simple but fascinating acts that produce “works of art”, creative lamps and furniture made of genuine and traditional lacquer.

Name: Microcell Marketing (Asia) Pte Ltd
Description:
Microcell Marketing (Asia) Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based marketing company with R&D facilities and factories based in Taiwan.
Microcell is dedicated to the promotion of eco-friendly building materials for the betterment of our future generations. Believing only in offering the best quality products that are not only eco-friendly but also sustainable through unceasing R&D efforts.

Our strong belief in sustainability is demonstrated not only in our flagship product, CellWood, it is also a way of life that is reflected in the way we conduct our business and the way we run our operations.

We share our accumulated industry experience with our customers through our professional knowledge and capabilities in the utilisation of CELLwood to help our client succeed in the rapidly changing global market.

At Microcell, we promote sustainability through conscious and practical efforts that are environmentally friendly in the way we conduct our business and operations.
Microcell stands at the forefront of eco-friendly material development to bring new sustainable building materials to fruition for our future generations.
Microcell endeavours to promote environmental protection principles in our dealings with our vendors, suppliers and customers through direct efforts in our production processes and/or by helping downstream manufacturers indirectly to conserve energy and counter deforestation.
Microcell wants to encourage the reduction in deforestation through R&D and the manufacturing of Eco- Friendly, Non-Toxic and Recyclable wood-alternative materials.

Microcell aims to be a major supplier of wood-alternative materials in the long run by adopting multi-faceted, sustainable and eco-friendly policies in the research and development, manufacturing, marketing, distribution and utilisation of our line of products and services in the building industry.

Name: Vizualizar
Description:
Vizualizar – Elevating Interaction and Collaboration

At Vizualizar, our mission is to revolutionize how people connect, collaborate, and interact with digital content. We specialize in advanced interactive display solutions that enhance the way teams work, learn, and engage in various environments, from corporate settings to educational institutions and public spaces.

What Sets Us Apart

What truly distinguishes Vizualizar powerful suite of solutions built on the Conversar Workplace platform:

VizTouch: Enables seamless, real-time collaboration across large multi-touch displays.
VizRooms: Manages room reservations and command centers with intuitive control systems.
Vizualizar Tangible: Transforms displays into interactive experiences through AI-powered object recognition.
VizSpatial: Delivers immersive VR presentations and spatial computing capabilities.
These platforms, combined with our innovative hardware, provide an unmatched user experience, making complex processes simple and collaboration more immersive.

Our Solutions

Vizualizar offers a range of cutting-edge technologies:

Multi-touch Displays: Ultra-responsive PCAP displays, perfect for multi-user interaction.
AI-Powered Object Recognition: Engage with digital content through real-world objects, creating new levels of interactivity.
Customizable Solutions: Tailored to fit the unique needs of each project, ensuring the highest standards of quality and usability.

Global Reach

Our solutions are deployed in over 50 countries, empowering global enterprises, educational institutions, and government agencies. With offices and experience centers worldwide, Vizualizar provides local expertise with global resources, ensuring that our clients receive the best support wherever they are.

Join Us in Shaping the Future

Vizualizar is more than a technology provider; we’re a partner in creating experiences that inspire and transform. Join us as we push the boundaries of what’s possible in interactive technology.

Name: Polytec SEA
Description:
At Polytec South-East Asia, we are leaders in advanced optical measurement technologies, specializing in Vibrometry, Velocimetry, and 3D Surface Metrology.

Our mission: 
To help innovators across industries measure with accuracy, efficiency, and zero contact — whether in R&D or production.

We serve clients in Aerospace, Automotive, Semiconductor, Biomedical, Acoustics, Ultrasonics, and more across SEA, India, Australia, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Taiwan.

1. Vibrometry
Harness the power of Laser Doppler Vibrometry (LDV) for non-contact vibration velocity measurements:
• Exceptional dynamic performance and accuracy
• Portable, stable, and easy to use
• Designed for quick, precise, non-intrusive vibration analysis in any environment

2. Surface Metrology
Optimize your surface quality control with non-contact optical profilometry and 3D topography:
• Fast, high-resolution, contact-free measurements
• Seamless inline integration for process control
• Trusted systems like TopMap white-light interferometers for lab and shopfloor

3. Velocimetry
Drive smarter production with optical length and velocity measurement systems:
• Non-contact, real-time monitoring of moving materials
• Reliable, robust solutions for industrial-grade performance
• Non-destructive, high-efficiency quality control in line

Nextevo offers sustainable, eco-friendly fiber made from pineapple leaf waste. Pineapple leaf fibers promote a more circular approach; they are natural fiber alternatives to cotton & polyester. 

Environmental & Social Impacts:
Not only does our works reduce environmental pollution, but also empower and create better livelihoods for farmers in the region.

Through a lean manufacturing process, we upcycle this waste to form a new engineered material: stronger than oak, harder than maple. Serving a variety of industries, this material is locally handcrafted to create a 9cm coaster, to a 5m Conference Table, to a 15m feature wall. Returning to the economy to serve the community, all the while storing carbon, that would have been otherwise released and contributing to climate change.
By giving this single used waste a 2nd life, we demonstrate how waste can be transformed into a resource.

Once a Chopstick, Now a Statement
