It specializes in specialty coatings on paper and films, and the production and sale of synthetic paper. It owns leading brands such as Polyart, Fluolux, Robuskin, Fiberskin and Satinex.  Polyart has been a valued partner to the graphic design and printing industry for over 50 years. Polyart is the synthetic paper that looks and prints like paper but has the durability of plastic. Polyart products are designed for a wide variety of applications such as durable labels, tags, maps, brochures, menus, cookbooks, door hangers, signs and displays, shelf-talkers, event tickets, In Mould Labeling for blow moulded containers (IML labeling), high-end packaging, retail promotions and more.  With worldwide sales, Polyart operates manufacturing sites and R&D centers in Europe (France, UK and Germany) and the US (Charlotte, NC) and sales offices in India, China and Singapore.   With its strategy of constant innovation, Polyart provides customers with high added-value and environmentally-friendly solutions for the labeling and graphic market.
Location: France, USA, UK, Germany, India, China, Singapore

Name: RelSus
Description:
Relsus is a FoodTech start-up with a vision to help people live "Healthy Lives on a Healthier Planet". Relsus is on a mission to innovate and produce at scale, high quality, sustainably produced, natural & healthy food ingredients to empower people to live healthy life while at the same time contributing towards improving the health of our planet.

Relsus has developed a range of high-quality plant-based proteins from natural sources: Chickpea, Mung bean, Pea and Rapeseed. In order to ensure quality, transparency, sustainability and reliability of supply chains, Relsus has adopted an integrated approach from Farming to Product development to Production of Plant-based Protein Isolates and Concentrates. We prefer relying on our own or partner agricultural farms using organic farming practices for raw materials, self-developed production process used in our own state of the art production facility to ensure high quality product produced in a highly sustainable manner. We want to be the preferred supply partner for deserving food and beverage companies.

“Relsus” stands for Reliability (Rel) & Sustainability (Sus), both of which are central to the DNA of Relsus. We refer Reliability & Sustainability with wider definition to include corporate responsibility towards all stakeholders including the society, employees, planet, suppliers, and customers. We believe that an honest, transparent, and people & planet respecting culture is key to long term success of any company.

Relsus was founded by a highly qualified team having over 120 years of combined experience at senior positions in leading multinational companies in the field of Nutritional ingredients, Pharma API with extensive experience on fermentation, enzymatic & chemical processes as well as branding, marketing & selling products in global markets, corporate governance and people leadership.

Relsus is headquartered in Singapore and has farming, research & development and manufacturing operations in India.

Name: Furniture World Singapore
Description: We Make Your Space A Home With Our High Quality & Bespoke Furniture In Your Personal Style That Give

Name: True Social Group
Description:
At the heart of the True Social Group is the belief that  better living begins with the simple things.
Through a mix of inspiration and innovation, we are reshaping hydration and the essentials that help create a more fulfilling life for all.

Name: ElphaPex
Description: ElphaPex machines employ Foundation Logic's cutting-edge ASIC design to mine cryptocurrencies profitably and efficiently. The ElphaPex DG1 is the most power-efficient mining machine available in the market today to mine Scrypt-based cryptocurrencies such as Litecoin and Dogecoin.

Name: ASI Marine Offshore
Description:
ASI Marine Offshore is a unique bouquet of experienced professionals from marine and offshore industries. The actual operation started in 1997 with the name JBND with sheer passion and capacity to manage small to large projects. As our business grew, we understood the need for diversification in order to serve our clients better. With more than 15 year of experience, now, ASI Marine Offshore has become a key player servicing Marine, Offshore, Oil and Gas Industries for most of the critical maintenance and repair jobs. 

Our associated companies have managed many small & large projects in marine operation in Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia. 

With a strong working base in Singapore and Batam, Indonesia, ASI Marine Offshore specialized in the  maintenance, repair and new construction works  for Marine Offshore, Oil and Gas Industry. We are equipped with skilled manpower, modern tools & equipment, experience and expertise in different disciplines in the industry to provide one stop solution to meet  specific requirements. 

Whether its ship repair or new construction, we are committed to deliver projects undertaken by us on time with safety, quality and cost efficiency to meet our client’s requirement to their satisfaction.

Name: Hegg
Description:
Hegg is a Singapore-headquartered startup that aims to be the global leader that makes plant-based eggs a local staple.

We believe in empowering people - regardless of their cultural backgrounds and dietary preferences - to have a fulfilling plant-based journey by making our eggless products delicious, healthy, and inclusive.

Whether you are a baker, chef, restaurant owner or home cook, we've got you covered!

For enquiries, contact hello@eathegg.com

Name: Urban Tiller
Description:
Urban TIller is WORLD's FIRST and ONLY Leafstock agnostic leaf protein company. Our mission to accelerate adoption of plant based foods by supplying novel ingredient Rubisco, the most abundant and most sustainable plant protein in the world. We are a B2B novel ingredient company supplying leaf protein and fibre extracted from a variety of leaves. 

We have developed a proprietary process to extract Rubisco (Ribulose-1,5-bisphosphate carboxylase-oxygenas), the world’s most abundant and high-quality leaf protein from a wide variety of green leaves. RuBisCo also displays promising techno-functional properties, such as a high foam volume and stability and a heat-induced gelation at low protein content. This makes Rubisco an ideal candidate not just as a key protein source but also a great additive to vegan and alternate protein products.

Name: Atera Water Pte Ltd
Description:
Steered by a team of experienced professionals in the water sector, Atera Water is a Singapore-based water start-up committed to reshaping the future of water treatment. We specialize in groundbreaking, eco-friendly, and economically viable water purification technologies, designed to empower communities tackling water challenges.

Our innovative technologies serve as a nexus, connecting the divide between the necessity for high-quality water and the often prohibitive costs of commercial filtration systems. With a commitment to both sustainability and economic viability, we do more than just purify water, we are clearing the way for a more equitable and water-secure future.

Name: Leong Hup Singapore Pte. Ltd.
Description: We are Singapore's Leading Food Manufacturer, providing quality chicken, beef, lamb, and halal small goods such as chicken sausages and hams. We cater to over 300 customers locally, comprising supermarkets, restaurants, wet market stalls, chicken rice stalls, hotels, and other food service providers.

Name: Visa Bulk Shipping Pte Ltd
Description: Visit the website

Name: Nandina REM
Description: At Nandina REM, we are on a mission to revolutionize the aerospace industry and combat climate change by cutting 1 gigatonne of greenhouse gas emissions from industrial supply chains by 2030. Our vision is to create a sustainable future where finite resources are reused, significantly reducing the need for virgin materials. With over 8,000 retired aircraft worldwide, we seize this opportunity to transform decommissioned planes into high-value circular materials, such as aluminum and carbon fiber, meeting the surging demand in manufacturing. By doing so, we not only reduce the extraction of natural resources and slash up to 84% of emissions from production but also prevent planes from languishing in boneyards, contributing to landfills. Join us as we unlock the benefits of aviation circularity and pave the way for a greener, more sustainable manufacturing landscape.

Name: Locker & Lock
Description:
Locker & Lock stands as the leading solution provider for diverse locker storage systems, specializing in empowering clients with faster, easier, and more convenient storage solutions. Over the past 30 years, we have tapped into innovation, space-saving technology, and the versatility of our talents to administer customized storage solutions to a broad and diverse clientele. Our dynamic evolution has expanded our offerings to include cutting-edge Smart Lockers, and our portfolio boasts prominent projects such as Singapore's island-wide national federated locker initiative, showcasing our dedication to innovative and impactful solutions. With a regional footprint across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, and Myanmar, we proudly serve numerous businesses throughout the Asia-Pacific region.

At Locker & Lock, security, durability, and convenience are the bedrocks of our organization. We provide the most comprehensive range of lockers in the Asia-Pacific region, including Smart Lockers, ABS, PVC, and metal lockers. Our commitment to excellence ensures we remain a reliable partner for effective storage solutions. 

Visit our website to learn more about our offerings and how we can meet your storage needs.

Name: Singapore Air Charter
Description:
What we do: Singapore Air Charter operates as a global provider of premium executive passenger and freight services in a best-in-class segment of the expedited transportation industry. Services include: Air Freight, Air Cargo, Air Charter, Aircraft acquisition, management and leasing. With our Global Air Operator Certificate we can offer charter-back services as part of our management service.

Our Vision: To Deliver Solutions to the Aviation Sector World-Wide

At Singapore Air Charter, We design and implement executive passenger and air freight transportation solutions, We develop and optimise operations providing strategic global air-cargo requirements for international and local organisations.
Our core values are focused on customer first, integrity, and teamwork. We have a strong desire to be the best in the industry, focused on investment in our team and leading edge technology to ensure that Singapore Air Charter (SAC) will continue to be an aviation industry leader our valued clients can depend on.

Singapore Air Charter acts on their clients behalf to source aircraft available for charter and provides aircraft management services and a consultancy in the sale and acquisition of aircraft. The company lists royalty, heads of state and major corporations amongst its distinguished clientele and places special emphasis on group charter using high capacity aircraft.

Name: Willing Hearts
Description:
A secular, non-affiliated charity, Willing Hearts is wholly run by volunteers, apart from a handful of staff. It operates a soup kitchen that prepares, cooks and distributes about 6,500 daily meals to over 40 locations island wide, 365 days a year. Beneficiaries include the elderly, the disabled, low income families, children from single parent families or otherwise poverty stricken families, and migrant workers in Singapore.

Willing Hearts is a registered as a society with the Ministry of Home Affairs since February 2005 and as a charity with the Ministry of Ministry of Social and Family Development since December 2008.

Vision
Improving the lives of the underprivileged and marginalized by providing them with their “daily bread” and to help them become useful members of our society.

Mission
To provide daily meals and other support services to the underprivileged, the needy, and other marginalized members in Singapore, and to assist and guide them towards rehabilitating and reinstating themselves as useful members of our society.

Name: CoolestDC
Description: We are a thermal, power and performance management company offering innovative & sustainable cooling solutions to the data center industry. By working closely with our customers, we deliver the best in class efficiency, total power consumption savings and performance enhancement solutions so as to make the data center industry more sustainable.

Name: Soul & Tables
Description:
Welcome to Soul & Tables, your destination for premium and sustainable furniture for all your spaces. Founded as Ethnicraft Online in 2012 by two ambitious Belgians in Singapore, we have evolved into Soul & Tables, a trusted partner in creating lasting and captivating spaces across industries.

At Soul & Tables, we offer an exquisite range of premium furniture, carefully curated from esteemed Belgian brands Ethnicraft, PR living & Roolf- Dutch brands Woven+, Fatboy, - French brand Fermob, and many more. Under our Soul & Tables brand, we design and offer unique pieces that add a touch of sophistication to any space.

Are you looking to rent rather than purchase? Rent premium furniture for your space with a flexible plan and no long-term commitments with Flexisnug, our rental brand. 

Join our vibrant community and let Soul & Tables help you create spaces that leave a lasting impression. We are already a trusted partner for Privé, hmlet, Claudine, PLQ, Wework, and many more.

Contact Us:
info@soulandtables.com.sg

Name: International Furniture Fair Singapore
Description:
The International Furniture Fair Singapore, held in conjunction with the ASEAN Furniture Show (IFFS/AFS) and the newly rebranded Nook Asia, is regarded by industry experts as Asia’s premier sourcing platform and design-led exhibition. With over three decades of experience since its inaugural event in 1981, the IFFS/AFS remains the most distinctive channel for regional and international companies to penetrate the global market.


Together, the events – IFFS/AFS and Nook Asia – will feature a comprehensive range of furniture, furnishing, decorative accessories, interiors and fittings by a diverse portfolio of quality exhibitors, as well as offer an unparalleled outreach and access to the latest technological machinery development to the highly dynamic market, and attract a healthy and well-represented attendance of trade buyers and visitors from the entire furniture ecosystem and value chain.
 

To make it a holistic trade event, the various design initiatives – SingaPlural, Design STARS, International Designer Showcase, Furniture Design Award, and Design Seminars – offer added depth and dimension to this Singapore-anchored trade event, raising its profile as a show not-to-be-missed in the industry calendar.
 

IFFS/AFS is supported by the ASEAN Furniture Industries Council (AFIC), DesignSingapore Council, International Enterprise (IE) Singapore, Singapore Exhibition and Convention Bureau and SPRING Singapore.

Name: Futuristic Store Fixtures Pte Ltd
Description:
Futuristic Store Fixtures Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of V3 Group, is a store fixtures specialist serving global retail clients. Its niche is in building consistent custom store fixtures value engineered in modular system to facilitate global roll-out.

Founded in 2005, Futuristic has more than 500 employees globally and has rolled out more than 8,000 retail stores across 56 countries in the last decade. With 500,000 square feet of wood, metal and solid surface manufacturing facilities in Malaysia and China, we offer risk management solution to our clients to cushion against socio-economic, geo-political and environmental factors that could affect either production origin from operating optimally.

We believe in details and consistency, thorough communications and team commitment to each project for every successful store launch, brand new and refurbished alike.

For our full list of clients please visit our website: www.futuristicgroup.com

Name: Volt14 Solutions
Description:
Volt14 is an advanced battery materials startup developing ultra-high
capacity electrode materials for lithium-ion batteries.

By developing turnkey technologies for battery cell producers globally, we enable breakthrough advancements by leveraging the scale and maturity of existing production processes.

Name: the moonbeam co.
Description: connecting food waste to consumer demands

Name: RenewMaterial
Description:
Registered as RenewFibre Asia in Singapore, we are the “Alternative to Wood.”

Focusing on research and development of renewable, sustainable and green materials, Renew Material specialises in the design, development, and manufacture of environmentally friendly materials and products for a wide range of application. We believe that through continuing education and scientific measure, we can create a sustainable living for many generations to come.

Our products are made from up to 95 per cent agricultural fibres such as rice stalks, wheat stalks, and bamboo waste. They are formaldehyde-free material with moist-resistant and fire-retardant properties that can be customised for different textures and colours that are ideal for furniture, flooring, wall tiles, decorative panels, lifestyle, home furnishing products, etc. We have won global awards such as German Design Award 2020, People’s Choice Award for SG Mark 2019, SBR's Made in Singapore and Designed in Singapore Awards 2019, Singapore Environmental Achievement Award. Aside from these awards, we have received certification from Singapore Green Building Council and Solar Impulse as 1 in 1000 solutions to change the world.

As part of our environmental awareness movement, we conduct regular talks and events to promote the use of renewable and sustainable materials as alternatives to wood and plastics. We give back to our community by helping to build schools in the remote areas in China. The continuous effort in promoting green and sustainable material has been recognised by international organisations including The China National Science and Technology Agency.

As a RoHS/REACH and ISPM 15 compliant company, we are the first company in China to obtain EPAL manufacturing license that is now known and acknowledged worldwide. We are your go-to company for the environmentally friendly product. Drop us inquiries at sales@renewmaterial.com

Name: SAS Asia Bar Systems Private Limited
Description:
Established in 2012, SAS Asia Bar Systems Pte. Ltd. has been supplying high quality thread bars from our mother Company, Annahuette, to the Asian market. 

SAS bar systems feature high quality thread bars of various grades, up to prestressing steel quality, in a range of diameters from 12 to 75 mm. We provide various system solutions for a variety of technical engineering purposes, including thread bar anchors for mining and tunnelling, reinforcement connections, form ties, tie rods, soil nails, micropiles, rock and soil anchors for geotechnical applications as well as prestressing tendons for post-tensioning. 
 
Our SAS thread bar systems are used for connections, formwork and anchorages and have been installed in large-scale construction projects worldwide. Whether for building, underground, bridge or road construction, tunnelling or mining, SAS can supply the steel you need to get the job done. In the technical engineering sector, SAS system products have made us the leading global supplier of hot-rolled thread bars.

Quality and Know-how are more than just two words for us. 
It is our Company's mission which is evident in our processes and products.

Name: Qosmosys
Description:
QOSMOSYS is a pioneering spacetech architect, founded in 2020, with a mission to shape the future of space exploration for the betterment of humanity.

Qosmosys specializes in designing system and subsystem architectures, seamlessly integrating advanced technologies while ensuring alignment with sustainable and profitable business models.

The company firmly believes that addressing the emerging lunar economy not only drives engineering innovation but also unlocks new possibilities for applications on Earth and in broader space exploration endeavors.

Name: Markono Group Pte Ltd
Description:
At Markono, we are shaping the future of reading-driven by the global demand for knowledge, information, and entertainment. We are grounded in the belief that books have the power to shape minds, spark imagination, and fuel aspirations.

Our team of book printing and supply chain specialists is dedicated to expanding access to knowledge through efficient and cost-effective solutions - from offset and digital printing, to warehousing, fulfilment and distribution. Our print-on-demand capability helps to reduce inventory obsolescence and lower holding costs. These end-to-end, fully integrated solutions help publishers to reach more readers across Asia-faster, at any scale and in a more sustainable way.

Name: JOS Furniture
Description:
JOS Furnitures was founded at the peak of the Covid 19 pandemic where offices worldwide were shut. Our founders carry a firm belief that it is time for businesses to operate via a circular economy that adds to the world and future generations as opposed to accepted norms. Yet, this fulfills the profit and productivity goals of organisations of all scales.

We provide smart office solutions that are ergonomic, productive, and sustainable for organisations of all sizes. We understand the challenges and opportunities for every office project, and always strive to deliver with excellence and great service.

Our products are designed to make the world a better place while advocating productivity and individual well-being at the workplace. From ergonomic design from scratch to sustainable material sourcing, we believe in empowering organisations to do their best work in a sustainable manner for the world.

Name: Alternō
Description:
Alternō was founded with a vision to create Asia's first low-cost thermal energy storage solution for renewable energy, to be deployed widely across the region by 2050.

Alternō received early stage funding from Antler VC in Jan 2023 to kick off the research & development.

Name: Dreamcore
Description:
Dreamcore was founded in 2017 with the vision that the PC could be small, powerful and beautiful. It had to be fully customizable, and provide a future-proof solution for our customers. We've since expanded our lineup to include desktops of various form factors and aesthetics, for purposes ranging from gaming to professional deep learning workstations.

Most importantly, we believe that your PC should serve your needs, and have recruited a team of experienced gamers, creators and professionals to develop a comprehensive understanding of various possible workloads and use-case scenarios.

If you're looking for a new desktop, rest assured - leave the hard work to us. We pride ourselves in our craftsmanship and service, and will build your desktop as though it were our own. So spend less time worrying, and more time enjoying the new desktop you're going to get.

Visit www.dreamcore.com.sg to get started.

Name: Mycosortia
Description:
Here's a LinkedIn company overview summarizing Mycosortia in one paragraph:
Mycosortia is a pioneering food technology company specializing in upcycling food waste into high-value, plant-based ingredients. Our proprietary microbial biotransformation technology transforms food side streams into FibProt, a sustainable and versatile ingredient with applications in plant-based foods, confectionery, and flavoring. We partner with B2B customers to supply FibProt as a clean-label solution and also develop and market innovative, sustainable food products like plant-based cheese and cocoa-free chocolate-like treats through B2B2C channels. Join us in revolutionizing the food system and creating a more sustainable future.

Name: ZENXIN Organic Food
Description:
Founded in 2001, Zenxin Agri-Organic Food is now Malaysia’s leading grower, distributor and retailer of organic food. Since its establishment, Zenxin Agri-Organic Food has been a trusted source of delicious and healthy foods grown without chemical fertilizer and pesticides. Zenxin Organic Food is popular for its down-to-earth reputation and tasty organic vegetables and fruits in major supermarkets in Malaysia and Singapore region. With strong credibility and large satisfied customer base, Zenxin Organic Food strives to be the leader of health food suppliers in South-East Asia.

Today, Zenxin has 18 organic shops, 3 organic distribution centres, 1 organic fertilizer factory, 1 recreation park - Zenxin Organic Park and has Zenxin Organic brand fresh produce distributed in the across Malaysia, Singapore and China. We pursue the sustainable goal of becoming the leader of organic food in Asia!

We welcome to join us to explore jobs or collaboration activities in the organic food industry!

Name: Blackmagic Design Asia
Description:
Blackmagic has grown rapidly to become one of the world's leading innovators and manufacturers of creative video technology. And that's because our philosophy is refreshing and simple - to help true creativity blossom.

Blackmagic Design's founders have had a long history in post-production editing and engineering. With extensive experiences in high-end telecine, film and post, harnessed with a real passion for perfection, Blackmagic set out to change the industry forever.

A company dedicated to quality and stability and focusing on where it's needed most; Blackmagic has created some of the most talked about products in the industry. World famous for their unbeatable codecs, Blackmagic envisioned truly affordable high-end quality editing workstations built upon Blackmagic software and hardware.

In November 2002, Blackmagic launched the DeckLink capture card and in doing so single handedly made working in true 10 bit uncompressed video on a Macintosh OS X system an affordable reality. The DeckLink card has become a market-leading product due to Blackmagic Design's philosophy of delivering "what ever it takes to give creative editors and designers the very best quality tools".

"Blackmagic Design is dedicated to allowing the highest quality video to be affordable to everyone, so the post production and television industry can become a truly creative industry." Grant Petty-CEO

Name: IPage UM Services Pvt Ltd (IPAGE UMS)
Description:
IPage UM Services Pvt Ltd, founded in 2008 by Mr. Dev R, began its operations in Singapore, expanding to India in 2014. As a specialist UAV company, we are at the forefront of professional aerial surveying and mapping, redefining industry standards.

Our aerial surveys, utilizing both autonomous and manually controlled UAVs, capture high-resolution spatial data across various sectors. Since late 2015, our deployment of state-of-the-art UAVs has yielded exceptional results, underscoring our expertise in UAV aerial surveying and mapping. By surveying extensive land areas swiftly and with greater detail than traditional ground surveying methods, we provide accurate, current data that empowers clients to maximize their land's potential.

Name: ASCENT
Description: Ascent powers Air Mobility in Asia. Leveraging its technology and know-how in large-scale aircraft operations, Ascent democratizes air taxi, cargo, and medical services across urban and regional areas. Ascent has become a convenient, reliable and sustainable mode of mobility addressing congestion, connectivity and safety challenges.

Name: Epitex International Pte Ltd
Description:
Epitex was born in 1997, inspired from the words “Epic Textures” to evoke our passionate pursuit to create the softest materials everyone wants to sleep with.
We passionately provide inspirations and creations of comfort through our People, Quality and Innovation. To us, it is just our single- minded dedication to bring exceptional comfort in every thread, every fabric, to every home. 

World-class yet proudly home-grown, we continue to be one of Singapore’s comfiest brands, with a wide collection of quality bed sheets, bed linens and pillows. We constantly unfold dimensions of cosy, expanding into home fragrance and bath to suit every kind of sleeper and daydreamer.

Name: Hosen Group Ltd
Description:
Hosen Group, or Hock Seng Food, was established in the 1970s and has since grown to become one of Asia’s leading importers, exporters and distributors of fast moving consumer goods (“FMCG”), specialising in packaged foods. The Company adopted the name Hosen Group Ltd when it went public on the Singapore Stock Exchange in September 2004.

Hosen Group, through its wholly-owned subsidiaries in Singapore, Malaysia and China, has developed an extensive and robust distribution network that spans Asia, Europe, Middle East, Africa and the Oceanic countries. Today, Hosen’s brands of products can be found on the various continents of the world.

Our brands are renowned for providing premium quality products at affordable prices. With more than 40 years of experience in brand management and product development, we have won many accolades and bagged numerous awards over the years, including the Most Promising Brand Award, Superbrands Award, and Influential Brand Award, The Company has also been awarded Singapore 1000 Company (Public Listed) for consecutive years.

Name: Meatiply
Description: Meatiply is an innovative company developing and producing cultivated meat cuts, with a focus on Asian cuisines. We conduct cutting-edge research with the vision of generating healthier and more environmentally-friendly products that mimic the taste and texture of conventional meat.

Name: KairaGlobal
Description:
Kaira Global is a leading Information and Communications Technology (ICT) distributor, specializing in delivering cutting-edge solutions in security software, Pro AV networking & 5G connectivity solutions, data storage, and interactive display systems. Our solutions are designed to meet the evolving needs of corporate enterprises, educational institutions, government, healthcare, financial services, and the manufacturing sector.
 
Our diverse product portfolio includes workspace solutions, advanced surveillances cameras, wireless networking, IT peripherals, gaming, smart IT devices and consumables.
 
In a highly competitive ICT landscape, Kaira Global focuses on ensuring ready stock availability, reliable warranty support, and expert design and consultation services. By partnering with key stakeholders, we help our clients stay ahead of industry trends, offering innovative products that drive profitability and long-term business growth.

Name: Cooking Art
Description:
OUR HISTORY
Cooking Art was birthed in the 1980s as one of Singapore's pioneer professional culinary schools. Under the directives of its Wilton-trained founder, Mrs Esther Kim Sim, Cooking Art soon became one of Singapore’s premium cooking schools. In the mid-90s, Cooking Art entered a new arena to meet rising needs for a first-rate local dessert supplier for Singapore’s hotel industry. Using the wealth of culinary expertise garnered from her acclaimed cooking school days, Cooking Art went behind the scenes and has since grown to serve Singapore’s 5-star hotels and Istana events, with special requests from international delegates to give them the experience of unique Singaporean desserts.

OUR WORK
Through our years of experience, Cooking Art has had the pleasure and privilege of serving Singapore’s top hotels and partnering with Singapore’s best executive and pastry chefs on local and international projects such as overseas Singapore food promotions, local heritage celebrations and in-house events and promotions.

QUALITY ASSURANCE
Specializing in Nonya Kuehs and other local delights, our products are made fresh every day in our 24-hour, year-round ISO22000 kitchens to ensure that our customers always get the freshest of products. Here at Cooking Art, we believe in caring for our customers by caring for theirs too. Our products do not contain any preservatives. It is, and always has been, a pleasure provide our customers with products that offer the best local culinary experiences.

Name: IPET SYSTEM
Description:
IPET Systems is a developer of innovative integrated propulsion systems for professional multirotor and fixed-wing drone platforms. With over a decade of specialized R&D experience in UAV propulsion, our expert team utilizes real-world feedback from thousands of customers to ensure that our products remain at the cutting edge of unmanned aviation technology.
IPET (Integrated Electric Power Technology) features a unique system design that directly embeds electronic speed controllers (ESCs) inside each motor enclosure, significantly reducing wiring and space requirements. These compact modules are paired with specially optimized propellers to create a highly efficient propulsion solution that offers extremely low noise and excellent longevity.

Follow us and keep up-to-date on our latest developments.
------------

Name: Hettich Southeast Asia
Description:
Technology for furniture
Hettich is one of the world's largest manufacturers of furniture fittings. In almost 80 countries, we work together towards one objective: developing intelligent technology for furniture. Hettich is at home in Kirchlengern, Germany. This is where ideas are born for furniture fittings we shape today and tomorrow with.
The Hettich brand is synonymous with quality, innovation, reliability and closeness to customers the world over. Technology for furniture – that's our passion. With it, we excite people across the globe. Hettich means a strong partnership with the furniture and white goods industry, with specialist retailers and the trades as well as the Do-It-Yourself sector.

Name: Alternative Selection Pte Ltd
Description:
Alternative Selection is the first wholesaler and retailer of alternative gourmet, organic, allergen and preservative free specialty foods in Singapore. Products and services offered include full comprehensive range of organic meat (beef, lamb, pork, chicken), full comprehensive range of free-range meat (beef, lamb, pork, chicken and game meat), value added meat products (sausages, meat, meat platters, etc) alongside gluten-free pastries, superfood, sauces and condiments.

Alternative Selection believes in organic agriculture and farming, sourcing directly from the best farms internationally. Working with like minded farmers who believe in stringent sustainable and responsible sourcing to offer healthy choices with full product traceability without compromising on quality, nutrition or taste. 

To offer the best meat products, Alternative Selection has a full Food (Meat) Processing Establishment that is FSSC 22000 v5.1, ACO, HACCP and SFA Accredited. With a Master Butcher heading the meat processing factory, Alternative Selection is able to offer the best quality meats and cuts to all its customers.

Alternative Selection currently supplies to shops, cafes, restaurants and hotels throughout Singapore.

Name: Seng Hua Hng Foodstuff Pte Ltd (Camel Nuts)
Description:
Seng Hua Hng Foodstuff Pte Ltd specializes in peanuts and have been producing nut snacks under the Camel Nuts Brand since 1974. It is the only large scale nuts manufacturer in Singapore and sources and imports it’s raw materials from qualified growers and farmers for processing and distribution worldwide.

The Company maintains a strong focus on quality, research and development and continuous improvement in its operational processes to bring a wider range of nutritious and tasty products to its customers worldwide.

Our customer base ranges from groceries stores to institutions, factories, airlines and retail conglomerates. We have a fleet of more than twenty vehicles that distributes our quality products to more than 2,000 retail points in Singapore and across more than forty countries across the world.

Name: Refine Printing Pte Ltd
Description:
Refine Printing is a full service sheet-fed and digital print manufacturer. We provide a complete in-house service from pre-press to finishing. We can produce a large range of print from business cards, envelopes, marketing collaterals, to point-of-sale material and packaging.

With production facilities in Singapore and Malaysia, we always ensure that high quality work and customer satisfaction are our most important goals. Adopting the latest state-of-art machines and software solutions, we will always deliver quality prints at competitive prices.

Name: Bless Brothers
Description: Founded in Singapore, Bless Brothers combines British elegance with Singaporean innovation to create furniture that is as timeless as it is functional. With strong footprints in both Singapore and the UAE, we craft pieces that tell a story—pieces designed not just to furnish homes, but to enrich lives.

Name: Sydrogen Energy
Description:
Sydrogen Energy Pte. Ltd. (“Sydrogen”) is Nanofilm Technologies International Limited’s (“Nanofilm”) effort in building sustainable energy solutions for the hydrogen economy. 

Building on Nanofilm’s deep expertise in vacuum coatings and carbon technology, Sydrogen brings to market innovative solutions in components, systems and integrated solutions for both fuel cell and electrolysers, completing the hydrogen value chain. 

Our vision is to realise our Hydrogen economy, today.

Name: Häfele Singapore
Description:
Häfele, an international company providing hardware and fitting systems and electronic locking systems, has a long and rich history that began in 1923. 

Established in 1988, Häfele Singapore serves the growing number of local clients using our extensive range of Furniture Fittings and Hardware Technology from Germany. Today, we continue to serve the industry with commitment and dedication.

Häfele is a highly regarded partner to the woodworking and building industry, architects, interior designers, contractors, property developers and end-users, Our comprehensive product range includes: Furniture Fittings, Sliding and Folding Door Hardware, Electronics Locking System Dialock, Kitchen appliances and Sanitary.

Name: W.Atelier Pte Ltd
Description:
W. Atelier is a purveyor of luxury home furnishings and accessories in Singapore. This homegrown brand has a history dating back to 1979 when it was first established as the exclusive distributor of TOTO, a household name in sanitary ware and bathroom fixtures. W. Atelier enabled Singapore homeowners to experience innovative Japanese bathroom technology through signature TOTO products such as the Washlet, an electronic toilet seat with a water-cleansing system. Since 2010, W. Atelier rapidly expanded to include an international array of home furnishing products from Italian furniture to German kitchens and Scandinavian furnishings to Spanish lightings. With an eye for detail and design, W. Atelier prides itself as a curator of fine objects richly steeped in history and tradition yet timeless and elegant. As such, every addition to is carefully selected, making it possible for customers to own some of the most iconic products in design history – products that have shaped the very history of design and will continue to set trends in time to come, such as the Egg chair from Fritz Hansen and the Sacco easy-chair from Zanotta.

The expansion of W. Atelier’s offerings from the bathroom to the rest of the home is borne of Japanese philosophy of “Kaizen” or continuous improvement. In line with W. Atelier’s commitment to improvement and quality, every brand added to its portfolio is a recognised leader in its respective industry. Ultimately, the wide selection of products from W. Atelier provides consumers with the convenience of furnishing their homes from a single location. To date, W. Atelier proudly carries more than a dozen global brands that include bathroom suites, system kitchens, furniture, lighting, and accessories. By leveraging on over 30 years of experience and carrying such prominent brands, W. Atelier is the expert in providing friendly advice and top recommendations to suit any customer’s style, be it classic, contemporary or minimalistic.

Description:
Sealy’s mission is a simple one: to help the world sleep better. This is more than just a hollow philosophy or something we hang on the walls. This mission literally drives everything we do. It’s for this reason that we spend more on research and development than any other mattress brands in the world.

Sealy has a long history of making quality beds. The first Sealy mattresses were made in 1881, in a small town called ‘Sealy’ in Texas, USA. In 1950, Sealy introduced its first Sealy Posturepedic brand mattress, the only mattress in the industry that focused on the importance of correct back support, designed in cooperation with Orthopaedic Surgeons.

Sealy Asia (Singapore) Pte Ltd is a joint venture between Sealy Inc. of USA and Sealy of Australia. Founded in 2001, the company started trading officially in December 2001. It is now well established as a premium brand in the local industry and has its products displayed on the floors of major retailers like Robinsons, Takashimaya, Tangs, Courts and Harvey Norman. Sealy also has its own Sleep Boutiques located across the island.

Through Sealy's initiative and never-ending aim for excellence, our mattresses have emerged as the preferred choice of international hotel chains such as St. Regis, The Ritz Carlton, Marina Bay Sands, InterContinental Hotel, Grand Hyatt, Capella, Four Seasons, Shangri-La etc.

With such a strong footing in the industry and through its superior design, manufacturing and leadership, Sealy is poised to continue its legacy for years to come.

Name: Singapore Golden State
Description:
SGS is one of the leading brands in printable label fabric (PFL). In fact the Golden State name goes back over 30 years before being renewed by TML in Singapore, a reflection of its worldwide reputation for quality.
SGS specializes in coated printable fabric label in the ranges of Nylon Taffetas (NT), Polyester Satins (PS), Polyester Taffetas (PT) and Polyurethane (PE). Coated fabrics can be designed for heat resistance, a more washable standard and also allow for color matching (DTM). Coated printable fabric is commonly used in the vast garment and footwear industry but also for hats, leather products, toys in addition to bedding and mattresses.
Coated printable fabrics are suitable for different kinds of printing methods such as letterpress, offset, silkscreen and hot stamp. Increasingly, the printing world is using Thermal Transfer Ribbon (TTR) for PFL due to its ideal ability for variable data and efficient operation. Our sister company ACE is a world renowned name in a wide range of TTR’s www.acettr.com. By using a combination of SGS printable fabric labels and ACE TTR our clients benefit from the best of both worlds.
At SGS we also supply natural fabric PFL including cotton so please speak to your local SGS representative for details of how we can assist with your next project.

Our approach combines hands-on executive leadership with strategic execution, delivering measurable results in safety, quality, efficiency, and profitability. With over 20 years of aerospace leadership experience across Singapore, Malaysia, and Thailand, we understand the unique challenges of operating in Asia's competitive aerospace markets.
What We Deliver:
 Interim COO/MD leadership during transitions, turnarounds, or growth phases
 Rapid operational assessments covering safety, quality, delivery, and financial performance
 PE-backed transformation and turnaround execution focused on EBITDA recovery
 Post-merger integration and operational carve-out support
 MRO operational excellence and manufacturing efficiency improvement
 Leadership team building and organizational restructuring
 Board-level reporting and stakeholder alignment
Our Focus:
We work exclusively in aerospace and MRO operations, serving organizations under private equity ownership, multinational aerospace groups, and independent MRO providers. Our engagements are results-driven—stabilizing operations, improving margins, and building sustainable leadership capability.
Track Record:

28% to 68% EBITDA improvement across multiple engagements
30-day rapid turnaround capability
4 PE-backed transformations successfully executed
20+ years aerospace operations leadership

Based in Singapore with deep operational experience across Malaysia and Thailand, we engage on interim leadership, transformation, and advisory mandates throughout Asia-Pacific's aerospace sector.

This innovative solution significantly reduces the usage of single-use plastics, helping to mitigate plastic pollution and promote a healthier planet.

REUSE
We offer a selection of high-quality reusable cups, mugs, sippers, and more, made from sustainable biocomposites consisting of agricultural residues such as coffee husk, rice husk, and rice straw. These durable products encourage the reuse of materials, reducing waste and the demand for single-use items.

RECYCLE
We offer takeaway containers, plates made from sugarcane & other agricultural waste are designed to be disposable and biodegradable, offering a practical and eco-friendly alternative to single-use plastics and bioplastics, which often require industrial recycling conditions. These containers, plates decompose naturally contributing to a cleaner environment.

Our products are thoughtfully designed and developed with circularity in mind. By focusing on reducing carbon emissions and maintaining a strong environmental ethos, Edibites aims to create a positive impact on our planet while providing sustainable and innovative tableware solutions.

Join us in our mission to protect and preserve Mother Nature, one bite at a time.

Each Signarama store is independently owned and operated but is part of a global company that boasts of world-class craftsmanship and customer service. In May 2012, the second SIGNARAMA store opened at Thomson Road (near Novena Church).  It is operated by Mr Andrew Mathew, who was the first employee (Graphics Designer) from the flagship store.  

Glides Pte Ltd is the the Master Franchises of SIGNARAMA for Singapore and Malaysia region.  Alex Butt (Wai Choon) left his 24 year of corporate executive role to start developing this brand in Asia.  He aims to provide opportunities to Singaporean and Malaysian to own a world class franchise Signarama stores.

We strongly believe that drone flying is for everyone; for the working adult who wants to dabble in a new hobby, or a young aspiring pilot who picks up a remote-control aircraft for the first time.

With the ever changing and increasingly challenging aviation scene in Singapore, it is DFA's obligation to teach the right thing and maintain a code of conduct within our community, while bringing positive flying experience to the mass. One of our core principle is to enforce safety while flying our unmanned aircraft, so that we can preserve the drone community's interests and allow everyone to continue sharing their flight experience with others.
